Title: Steampunk Gear City Grid T-Shirt
Description:
Embrace a retro-futuristic aesthetic with this vibrant Steampunk Gear City T-Shirt. Featuring a detailed, neon-infused graphic of intricate mechanical gears set against a modern grid cityscape backdrop, this design is perfect for enthusiasts of industrial design, cyberpunk culture, and vintage science fiction.

The design beautifully merges the elegance of clockwork mechanisms with the dynamic energy of a modern metropolis, making it a unique conversation starter.

  • Style: Bold and Graphic; Ideal for festivals, conventions, or casual wear.
  • Material: Printed on a comfortable, high-quality cotton blend tee (details provided in size charts).
  • Fit: Standard unisex fit, offering versatility for all body types.
  • Gift Idea: Makes an excellent gift for engineers, designers, steampunk fans, or anyone who appreciates complex mechanical art.

Step out and let your style tell a story of machinery and possibility.
